title: Gluten-Free Falafel Date Night
description: A savory and crunchy Korean-inspired dish featuring gluten-free falafel, perfect for a romantic date night.
instructions: Cook quinoa according to package instructions and let it cool.
Blend chickpeas, garlic, green onions, cumin seeds, coriander seeds, salt, paprika, turmeric powder, and enough water or veggie broth (if needed) in a food processor until smooth.
Add cooked quinoa into the blended mixture and mix well to combine.
Form falafel balls about 1 inch in diameter using your hands or a cookie scoop.
Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium heat. Add falafel balls and fry for about 5-7 minutes, turning occasionally until golden brown on all sides.
For serving, place fried falafel onto individual plates, top with dates if desired.
